title: Mass edits to Items in My Work
excerpt:

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since I’m viewing many tasks across multiple boards and workspaces in My Work, it would be incredibly helpful to be able to take mass action on multiple tasks at once, like updating statuses, or changing due dates.
I’m sure that My Work was designed to make users more efficient, but it slows me down tremendously b/c I still have to navigate back to the originating Boards in order to make mass changes.
